calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Receipts For The Blocked Accounts For Margery Magill And Rae Ann Magill
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of The Receipts From The Two Blocked Cutma Accounts For The Benefit Of Margery Magill And Rae Ann Magill.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-03-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order To Show Cause will be issued to the Executor to appear and show cause why he/she should not be punished for contempt for failure to file the receipts for the blocked accounts for Margery Magill and Rae Ann Magill. The return date is June 3, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Sprague for and with Bonnie MaGill.

The Court stated that there were two issues: the unauthorized distributions and the discrepancies in the ending assets on hand. Mr. Sprague stated that the the distributions occurred last year, that there was a miscommunication between myself and Ms. Sprague, that distributions were made to some heirs - not all, and that there was a $10,000 cap. In addition, Mr. Sprague stated that the funds had been restored, that according to the Examiner $532 over was returned, that he didn't think there should be a surcharge, that there were mistakes made but they weren't trying to hide anything, and that they worked hard to mitigate the damage that was done. The Court stated that there would be a surcharge with an amount to be determined. In addition, the Court ordered that the funds distributed to the two minors were to be placed in a blocked account; withdrawl by Court order only. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

The matter was continued to December 22, 2008. All entitled parties are to be given notice. The Third Amended First and Final Account is due by December 5, 2008.
